response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software engineer with 16+ years of experience, but lacks any expertise in the core competencies required for this role: SoC/IP modeling, GPU and AI accelerator architecture, deep neural network workload optimization, and hardware-software co-design. This position demands specialized systems-level hardware performance architecture fundamentally different from application-level backend development. The domain gap at principal level is too substantial to overcome.
strengths: Versatile systems engineer proficient across multiple languages (D, C/C++, TypeScript) and platforms from embedded to cloud
Demonstrated performance optimization mindset from microservices work, low-latency optimization, and async I/O expertise at Dunnhumby
Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure, showing emerging engagement with AI systems and tooling
concerns: Zero experience with SoC design, IP modeling, or any hardware architecture work—all core to the role
Career is entirely application-level (web backends, mobile, services); completely lacks GPU, SIMD/MIMD, and AI accelerator experience
No track record of performance analysis at hardware/workload level or designing systems for deep learning inference and training optimization

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or GPU architecture background
Strong software fundamentals and demonstrated learning ability
